transforms: Reviewed maintainer-provided logo candidates for the final two missing records.
Matched the cinematic arts logo to the official Facebook page OpenGraph image.
Matched the dramatic arts logo to an official Facebook page photo URL.
Generated WebP and AVIF variants under the universities CDN key namespace.
Uploaded verified variants to R2 and retained reviewed source URLs in data/assets.json.
reviewNotes: Final logo follow-up. Approved 2 additional logo assets, bringing canonical logo coverage to all 57 university and higher-institute records.
